Source URL: https://www.cbpp.org/research/social-security/
Fetch Date: 2026-05-05
Data Year: 2024-2025 (varies by report)
Coverage: All 50 states + DC (target)
File Type: PDF factsheets + data tables
Row Count: Variable by state; typically 10-15 metrics per state
Notes: CBPP publishes comprehensive state factsheets with SSDI and SSI beneficiary counts, average benefits, percentage of working-age population, child enrollment statistics, and county-level breakouts. Request blocked by Cloudflare; manual retrieval required.
